name: Cumulus
description: Fair-weather clouds drifting across a noon sky, the occasional sun breaking through — each redraw reshapes every puff.

code.style: --rule: ( /* the upper lobe rides on the emitted geometry of the base lobe and shares its tone */ --cloud: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --cl: @r(0, 36); --cw: @r(44, 70); --ch: @r(20, 32); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--cl) * 1%); bottom: 20%; width: calc(@var(--cw) * 1%); height: calc(@var(--ch) * 1%); border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--cloud); transition: ease 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc((@var(--cl) + @var(--cw) * 0.28) * 1%); bottom: calc(20% + @var(--ch) * 0.5%); width: calc(@var(--cw) * 0.55%); height: calc(@var(--ch) * 0.8%); border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--cloud); transition: ease 800ms; } } @random(0.1) { background: radial-gradient(circle at 70% 26%, var(--color3) 0 12%, transparent 13%); } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
